name: token-cost-guard
summary: Realtime agent token cost monitor with threshold-based alert reports.
description: Monitor OpenClaw or Hermes agent token usage from the active runtime's own records, prefer native billing fields when present, price DeepSeek/Kimi/GPT model calls as a fallback, compare current cost against the previous snapshot or current time window, and generate or send a Chinese alert report when spend exceeds a configured threshold, with cron-safe alert exits.

scripts.description: Stdlib-only CLI for computing OpenClaw or Hermes token costs and alerting on cost deltas.

author: harrylabsj
